name: Lowepro PRO Trekker RLX 450 AW II
description: The Pro Trekker RLX 450 AW II Backpack from Lowepro easily converts from a backpack to a rolling bag.

features.Key Features :: Converts from Backpack to Roller bag | Holds Camera with 70-200mm Lens Attached | Holds 4 Additional Lenses, Accessories | Customizable MaxFit Divider System | Pocket for 15" Laptop and 10" Tablet | External Tripod Holder | Made from Recycled Materials | Organizer Gearbox for Cables, Batteries | All-Weather Cover
features.What's in The Box :: Lowepro Pro Trekker RLX 450 AW II Backpack | Gearbox | Rain Cover | Tripod Cup
